rationale: Review 1's sole finding identifies a real but minor/clarification-only implicit-arg pattern in one `have` inside `convInv_mul_cancel` (visible in the diff at the `LinearMap.algHom_comp_convMul_distrib` call with its surrounding comments); reasonable maintainers could disagree on whether explicit `(A:=H)(B:=A)` is needed vs. the existing proof comments + Mathlib style. Review 2 correctly finds nothing material. Both resulting PRs are therefore essentially equivalent on proof-quality.
